differential_diagnoses: Delirium due to UTI and medication side effects
next_steps: Rheumatology consultation including testing for ESR, CRP, rheumatoid factor, and anti-CCP antibodies
Comprehensive nutritional assessment including evaluation for malabsorption syndromes like celiac disease
Radiographic evaluation of joints (hands, feet) to assess for erosive arthropathy
Diagnostic lumbar puncture to rule out inflammatory or paraneoplastic causes of cognitive/gait decline
Formal neuropsychological testing once acute delirium resolves to better characterize the cognitive decline
Review of all current medications and supplements to investigate potential contribution to B6 deficiency
